rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EVELYN DOLORES STACHNICK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 6, 2019. no file stamped copy of the petition and no proposed order delivered to Room 202 as required by Local Rule. in addition, the examiner quickly scanned the petition and notice and identified the following issues, that appear to require an amendment to the petition be filed: the petition requests distribution of the real property listed on the I & A, but Notices of Proposed Action were filed that indicate that property was sold; there are missing allegations re notice under probate code section 9202 (b) and (c); and new Notice is Required that lists the actual petition filed in the body of the Notice of Hearing form under #1, where it says "petitioner has filed . . ."

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
